executives.name: Robin Goad
executives.background: Mr. Goad is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He is the President and CEO of Fortune Minerals Limited and has served as a director and officer of several other public companies.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
